seo.title: TRIANGLE COFFEE | Specialty Coffee & Onigiri · Freshwater, Cairns
seo.description: A Japanese-run coffee stand inside Coco Shop on Kamerunga Rd, Freshwater — specialty coffee in signature teal cups, hand-whisked matcha and freshly made onigiri.

hero.title: TRIANGLE
descriptionLines: A small Japanese-run stand in Freshwater, Cairns —
specialty coffee, whisked matcha and freshly made onigiri.

features.title: Specialty coffee
features.desc: Dialled-in espresso and hand pour-overs from a Japanese barista — flat whites and lattes served in our signature teal cups.

features.title: Hand-whisked matcha
features.desc: Ceremonial-grade matcha, whisked to order — layered hot or iced over cold milk. Rotating seasonal flavours when the fruit is right.

features.title: Freshly made onigiri
features.desc: Rice balls made in-house — a plain nori classic and a daily mixed filling. The easiest Japanese breakfast in Cairns.

images.alt: Latte art in our signature teal cups — flat white & latte
Hand-whisked iced matcha latte, layered over cold milk
House-made onigiri — mixed filling & nori-wrapped classic

menu.footerNote: Items & prices change with the seasons — check Instagram @cafe.trianglecoffee for today’s specials.

items.name: Flat white
items.desc: House espresso & silky steamed milk in our teal cup

items.name: Latte
items.desc: Double shot, poured milk, proper latte art

items.name: Long black
items.desc: Double shot with hot water — clean and strong

items.name: Pour-over (filter)
items.desc: Hand-brewed single origin — ask what’s on today

items.name: Iced matcha latte
items.desc: Whisked ceremonial-grade matcha layered over cold milk

items.name: Seasonal matcha special
items.desc: Rotating house flavour — strawberry, Easter, etc.

items.name: Onigiri (nori classic)
items.desc: Warm rice ball wrapped in crisp nori — simple & satisfying

items.name: Onigiri (daily filling)
items.desc: Today’s mixed-rice onigiri — sesame, veg or salmon depending on the day

reservation.title: Say hi on Instagram
reservation.subtitle: No bookings needed — pop in at Coco Shop. For classes and enquiries, DM @cafe.trianglecoffee.

footer.subLine: Sales sample (not the live venue site) · Replace phone/email and photos with the venue’s real assets before publishing
